name: alerts
title: Active Alerts Table
description: Active-alerts table widget: a vertically scrollable, sticky-header table where each row is a severity badge (Critical / Warning / Info / Clear), the alert message, a source IP and a mono "Xm ago" timestamp. Rendered by the pure OOW.alerts renderer from a deterministic seed; severity badges use the --*-bg tints. The mount is the scroll region and is keyboard-focusable; rows carry a hover wash, and an aria-disabled table dims for no-data/loading.
